notes: Full X32 console (not Rack, Compact, or Core). The AES50 ports physically accept standard RJ45 plugs; Neutrik etherCON is a locking cable-end shell, not a different panel socket. USB configuration confirmed as 2x USB-B (rear) + 1x USB-A (top panel) from Alto Music specs. AES/EBU output is a single XLR (digital stereo). RCA connectors: 2 pairs (stereo in and stereo out, sharing the same 2-of-6 aux channels). Monitor CR outputs are paralleled XLR+TRS. Word clock BNC is only available via optional X-ADAT expansion card, not built-in, so omitted. Power inlet confirmed as IEC type; C14 inferred (standard for internal-PSU equipment at this power class) but not explicitly stated in sources. The unit ships with an X-UF (USB/FireWire) card installed from factory; FireWire connector type is 6-pin IEEE 1394a, but this is an expansion card port and varies by unit/revision, so omitted. Rack unit height is 6U (7.9 inches / 200 mm per manufacturer dimensions).
